docket_entries.description: PLAN I STATUS CONFERENCE DATE: HEARING SET FOR FEB-01-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-29-2002 AT 1:30PM. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Susan Crozier, CSR# 4761. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/29/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Vicki Gross. (212)
